author: MIRZA SHARIF BAIG
limitations: Predictions may not generalize to real-world populations without retraining.
ethical_considerations: Do not use predictions as the sole basis for healthcare decisions.
Review outputs with qualified healthcare professionals.
Monitor model performance and fairness after deployment.
intended_use: Estimate future healthcare costs to support operational planning, financial forecasting, and risk stratification. This model is intended to assist decision-making and should not be used as the sole basis for clinical diagnosis or treatment.
